title: olea angustifolia
intro: Olea angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved olive tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Olea angustifolia are said to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used to make essential oils and skin care products.
